title: exp_bin: Assertion `0' failed
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (id Int32, x Int32, y Int32, z Float32 NOT NULL) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE u (id Int32, a Int32, b Int32, c Float32 DEFAULT 0.0) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO u (id, a, b) VALUES (1, 2, 4), (2, 6, 8);
SELECT * FROM t AS t1 JOIN u AS u1 ON power((t1.x - u1.a), 2) < power((t1.y - u1.b), 2);
key_bug_features: select with power function on table self-join
